text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I find Mejiro Bright standing at the
school entrance with a smile on her face.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, today's a special day off at Tracen
Academy. No lessons nor training sessions will be
held.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: So, if you would please enter the car behind you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The door to a large black sedan parked parallel
to the academy gates opens. The driver dressed
in black politely bows.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee! You should already know. Our
destination is your second home, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: We're going to the Mejiro estate, of course.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't shake the feeling that this isn't really
happening. At the center of the scene stands the
grandmother of the family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's surrounded by the other notable Mejiros. I
can tell from the tension in the air that a heavy
discussion is imminent.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
If it is amenable to all, I, Mejiro Ardan, will lead
today's proceedings.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Our topic of discussion is the new wave that has
struck the Umamusume world.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
In other words, the "speed above all" mindset
that continues to spread.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: The presentation, please.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Butler
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Those attention-grabbing words "speed above
all" appear on the screen alongside a video.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Until very recently, both speed and stamina were
considered equal components in the racing world.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
However, as of late, the idea that speed is more
important has been gaining traction.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Many Umamusume emphasize this in their
training, while the duration of races has been
shortening. Additionally...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
More and more are refraining from participating
in stately long-distance races such as the Kikuka
Sho and spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
We're in an age of unprecedented speed. The
Umamusume garnering the most attention at this
time...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Is Marvelous Sunday, with Special Week and
others not far behind.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
These Umamusume are racing at speeds that
challenge the common notion of what is possible.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I am certain we will see more of this spectacular
ability emerge among the Umamusume who seize
victory in the G1 Classics.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It is safe to conclude that these racers are the
fastest history has yet to produce.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Until now, this time of year saw the racing world
abuzz with speculation over who would win the
spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
However, the times have changed. Now, the
greater emphasis is on medium-distance races.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Our main concern for today is reflecting on this
change and how we can best react to it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Goodness, Trainer. This took quite a turn.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Here I am, bearing witness to the great Mejiro
family determining their approach to contending
with this new era of speed-first racing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Grandmother
text_block_list.text:
From well-built, rounded athleticism... to speed.
This change has been happening gradually for
some time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Grandmother
text_block_list.text:
Yet, the final catalyst to bring us fully to this new
age was the appearance of a certain racer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Grandmother
text_block_list.text: The video, please.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Butler
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Grandmother
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki. Her speed is nearly magical. With it,
she earned shining recognition as a junior
champion.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Grandmother
text_block_list.text:
Those of the racing world were awestruck by her
speed, and that hastened the arrival of today's
preference.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Grandmother
text_block_list.text:
We cannot change the general consensus
surrounding racing today. Our concern is rather
how the Mejiros should respond.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Grandmother
text_block_list.text:
Our plan has always been to foster Umamusume
capable of winning the spring Tenno Sho and
other exemplary long-distance races.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Grandmother
text_block_list.text:
However, considering the limited time each of
you have for study and training, I am beginning to
think our methods outdated.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Grandmother
text_block_list.text:
I believe we have time for an open discussion.
Hence, I want you all to share your unfiltered
thoughts.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Grandmother
text_block_list.text:
I also expect each one of you to reflect on what
you wish the Mejiro family to be.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With those words, Grandmother Mejiro leaves the
room.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. Grandmother's right that this is something
we need to think about, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Does it really need so much attention? We've all
got our different goals and training routines...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But, like, think about it. What are you gonna do if
everyone else just whooshes past you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Precisely. However, I hesitate to think changing
the Mejiro way is the best course of action.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It seems the easy route, but it risks us forgetting
our history. We should bear that in mind as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Then, doesn't that make Ryan right? We can just
keep on like nothing's changed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
We might have to deal with fans losing interest in
us if we seem out of the times, though...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We would only have that privilege if we continue
to win.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: McQueen...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
No matter how you see it, the culture around
racing is ever-changing. That includes the
organization of the races themselves.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We may win all the long-distance races, but if we
cannot hold our own in medium-distances and the
balance of our record begins to change...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Our influence, then, will begin to fade. People
will begin to think the Mejiros lost their force.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If we are to prevent that, we may be left with no
other choice...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
So we should ride the wave? Double down on
speed training?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I understand your point, but I can't go along with
that. Of course, I know speed is important, but to
throw away what makes us Mejiro...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Opinions fly back and forth, and strong
arguments are made, yet no one can agree.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the midst of this debate, Mejiro McQueen's
eyes meet mine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Trainer, do you have any thoughts?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We'd appreciate the perspective of an outsider.
Please, what do you think the Mejiros should do?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm suddenly brought into the conversation.
Something feels caught in my throat, but I know I
can't refuse her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Bright gives me a gentle, reassuring smile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She herself is included in all this, as an inheritor
and emblem of the Mejiro tradition. If I consider
the road she's taken thus far as the path she
should continue to follow...
choice_data_list: I think... you can win everything as you all are.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Win everything as we are? You're saying we can
beat speed by continuing to focus on stamina?
choice_data_list: Yeah. That's the Mejiro way, if you ask me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That was certainly true in the past, I say further.
Mejiro Umamusume dominated both medium and
long-distance races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think it'd be best for them to improve on the
formula they've used this whole time. It's what
Mejiro Bright has been doing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Gotcha. Should've expected Bright's trainer to
say something like that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You've got guts! A setback like this is like a fun
challenge to you, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Words are just words. Actions are what matter. I
trust you understand that, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Accomplishing what you've said means winning
the spring Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
And it means she must stand as a bulwark against
this age of incredible speed. Do you understand?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Goose bumps rise on my arms. When put like
that, it sounds pretty difficult...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: But, McQueen, together with Trainer, I will do it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Let us make our attempt.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: We will win the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
By securing victory there, I will have stood
against the trend and protected the Mejiro family
in the process.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Bright...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The thought of my beloved Mejiro family
wavering against this wave makes my heart ache.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Trainer and I will do what we must to protect the
Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, can I trust you to stand with me? With us
together, I believe there's no need to worry.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You and I met for this exact reason, as part of
this long history.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I understand. I will report to Grandmother with
our decision. The Mejiros will emerge victorious
without changing our ways.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. I now see the value of inviting guests to
the estate every once in a while. Bright's trainer
helped to move things along.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus, Mejiro Bright has made her sudden promise
to win the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Mejiros cannot be left behind. They must
defeat this new generation of runners who value
speed over all else.
